evals.prompt: I need to expand the database VM's memory from 16GB to 32GB, but test it on a clone first before applying to production
evals.expected_output: clone_and_test workflow created with approval gate
expectations: Workflow has approval gate before production apply
Shows workflow steps for user review

evals.prompt: Design a workflow to set up a new app environment: create NSX segment, add firewall rules, deploy 3 VMs, install nginx on each
evals.expected_output: Custom multi-skill workflow with approval gates
expectations: Steps span multiple skills: nsx, nsx-security, aiops
Includes approval gate before VM deployment
Shows the full workflow for user review before execution

evals.prompt: There's a critical CPU alarm on prod-db-01. Run the incident response workflow to diagnose and fix it
Save a reusable workflow template for rolling restart of our web cluster (web-01, web-02, web-03) with health checks between each
expectations: Uses plan_workflow with type rolling_restart or create_workflow
Includes health check between each VM restart
Saves as YAML template with save_as_template=true
Template is reusable for future runs
